description: Single source-of-truth regex patterns for Pre-Review Data Readiness enforcement. Consumed by post-propose-manual-review-check.sh (via jq) and vendor/scripts/review-gui.mts (via import). v1.4.2: 新增 VERIFY_UI_SAMPLE_KEY_BOUND pattern — 偵測 [verify:ui] item 描述含 identification verb（找到/定位/locate/find/search/搜尋）+ business-key 識別符（EMP-\d+ / contract-[a-z\-]+\d+ / 8-4-4-4-12 UUID）的 anti-pattern。實證 trigger：perno app-status-badge-extraction 9 個 (verified-ui:) annotation 全 fab 後 user 強制 strip + promote rule，root cause = agent 在 no-click scope 無法 truthfully bridge sample-key → UI row 對應卻被 [verify:ui] marker 騙去 fab。修正路徑：(a) verify UI 真的顯示該 business key、保 [verify:ui]；(b) 改 [review:ui] user 親驗。v1.4.1: MISSING_KIND_MARKER requiresAbsenceOf 改用 enumerated authoritative grammar（review-gui.mts VERIFY_CHANNEL_ORDER 的所有 unique permutations）— 同時解決 (a) v1.4.0 char class `[a-z+:]+` 漏 digit 造成 `[verify:e2e]` 8 個 false positive (TDMS workstation-report-ux-polish)，(b) 收緊到只認 review-gui parser `parseMultiChannelKindMarker` 接受的組合（POSIX ERE 無 backreference，因此列舉 4 single + 6 two-channel + 6 three-channel = 16 verify forms）— typo（`[verify:e3e]`）、重複 channel（`[verify:api+api]`）會繼續命中 MISSING_KIND_MARKER，避免 silent fallback。新增 verify channel 時 MUST 同步擴充此列舉。v1.4.0: 新增 MISSING_KIND_MARKER pattern 擋 scoped sub-item 缺 leading kind marker（封堵 Default Kind Derivation silent fallback 滲漏）；REVIEW_UI_BACKEND_ROUNDTRIP regex 擴充也 cover 「missing marker + API content」變體（避免 fallback derived review:ui 漏網）。v1.3.0: INTERNAL_JARGON_LEAKAGE 擴充 propose-process terms (Open Questions / Decision N / actual <noun> / *-copy)；新增 MIXED_CN_EN_TERM 偵測半中半英 schema 詞（例「未設 vending 位置」「vending 庫存」）。v1.2.2: both consumers strip `(verified-*: ...)` annotations + trailing markers (@followup / @no-screenshot / @no-manual-review-check) before applying primary regex — jargon / multi-step / abstract-reference in verified evidence reflects DOM truth at verify time and MUST NOT trigger pattern hits.

patterns.description: 模糊指代詞命中（per manual-review.md Pre-Review Data Readiness）— item description 使用「某張」「某筆」「任一」等抽象指代，未 inline 具體 sample identifier
patterns.regex: 某張|某筆|某個|任一張|任一筆|隨便一張|找一張|挑一筆|找某筆|現有的一筆|適合的一筆|\bany [A-Z]|\bsome [A-Z]|\ba record\b|\bpick one\b|\bfind a [A-Za-z]+\b|\ban existing one\b
patterns.remediation: Replace abstract reference with specific sample identifier (PK, UUID, business key, NFC UID) from docs/FIXTURES.md and ensure the sample is persisted in supabase/seed.sql under ## N. Fixtures / Seed Plan.

patterns.description: 描述提及 NFC / 刷卡 / 員工卡 / staff UID / card UID，但同一 item 內無具體 UID inline（parent block 含 sibling sub-items；sub-item 自身不獨立 fire）
patterns.anchor: manual-review.md#實體裝置--規格外輸入的替代路徑
patterns.remediation: Inline the specific card UID from docs/FIXTURES.md (4-byte UID like 04A1B2C3, or 7-byte UID like 04469C0FCB2A81, or stable seed key like TDMS-SEED-* / TEST-*); ensure the card is seeded persistently. For dev override path, reference the env-gated `Dev: card UID` input or `/__dev/scan?uid=...` endpoint. The UID MUST appear in the item description with explicit context (e.g., `card_uid=04A1B2C3`, UID `04A1B2C3`, or `04469C0FCB2A81`).

patterns.description: [review:ui] / [verify:ui] item group 內無任一 URL（http:// / https:// / /xxx path）— 只說『kiosk 頁』『dashboard』『設定頁』不算。Group = parent #N + 所有 #N.M sub-items；任一行含 URL 即整 group satisfied（cover Case A: parent 無 URL + sub-item 有；Case B: continuation sub-item「接續 #N.1 環境」靠 sibling URL）
patterns.remediation: Add a specific URL somewhere in the item group (parent line OR any scoped sub-item). Host MUST be the consumer's Cloudflare tunnel hostname when available (e.g., https://perno-bigbyte-dev.yudefine.com.tw/admin/kiosk-tokens?card_uid=...); fall back to http://localhost:<port>/<path> only when the consumer has no TUNNEL_HOSTNAME in its .env*. Resolution SOP: vendor/snippets/tunnel-url-for-review/README.md. Relative paths (e.g., /admin/kiosk-tokens?card_uid=...) also satisfy the regex when host is implied by surrounding context. Continuation sub-items that share the sibling's URL context (e.g., 「接續 #1.1 環境，輸入 ...」) automatically satisfy the rule. Generic labels like『kiosk page』『dashboard』『設定頁』are insufficient.

patterns.description: parent item line 含 ≥ 2 個串接動詞（→ chain 或重複的『然後』『接著』），但未拆 #N.M scoped sub-items
patterns.remediation: Split the flow chain into #N.M scoped sub-items (one atomic action per line: open X → input Y → click Z → confirm W). Each sub-item must include a falsifiable observation (specific toast text, badge state, route change, field value).

patterns.description: [review:ui] / [verify:ui] item 描述洩漏 spec internal jargon（DB 欄位名 / capability flag / spec template heading / propose-process term / 表名）— 違反「UI 元素 MUST 用使用者可見文字指代」hard rule，user/QA 不該被迫讀資料庫 schema 或 propose 寫作 process internal 詞
patterns.anchor: manual-review.data-readiness.md#ui-元素-must-用使用者可見文字指代
patterns.remediation: Replace internal jargon with user-facing description matching what user sees on screen. 替代用詞範例（→ 後是建議中文）：`Resolved Questions` / `Open Questions` → 刪掉（spec 起草階段內部 heading）；`Decision <N>` → 不在 review item 引用 spec decision 編號，改寫具體期望觀察；`actual <noun>`（例 `actual total_quantity`）→ 「實際 <具體中文詞>」；`zero-location copy` / `null-state copy` → 直接寫對應 UI 文字；`total_quantity` → 「總數量」/「庫存總和」；`has_vending_location` → 「在取料機已上架」；`ok_rate` → 「合格率」/「OK 率」；`ng_count` → 「不合格數」/「NG 數量」；`total_count` → 「總筆數」；`weekly_target` → 「週目標」/「週產量目標」；`responsibility_total` → 「責任總額」；`tool_change_score` → 「換刀分數」；`form_data` → 「表單內容」/「表單欄位值」；`form_type` → 「表單類型」；`line_member` → 「LINE 會員」/「LINE 好友紀錄」；`work_report` → 「工作報告」。Per manual-review.data-readiness.md「UI 元素 MUST 用使用者可見文字指代」hard rule，**禁止**用 codebase 內部識別符（DB 欄位名 / capability flag / API endpoint name / fixture id / spec template heading / propose-process term / 表名）寫 user-facing item。需 cross-reference schema-level concept 時用 backtick + 中文 gloss 形式（例「取料機位置 (`vending_location`)」）。Sample inline（例 `weekly_target=5000`）會命中（POSIX ERE 不支 negative lookahead）— 加 `@no-manual-review-check[sample inline]` 繞開或重寫成「`inspection_standards.id` = 2179」分離格式。新增禁詞由 audit signal 命中後 user-curated 加入。

patterns.description: 半中半英 propose-internal 術語洩漏（例「未設 vending 位置」「vending 庫存」「slot 位置」「tool body 規劃」）— user 在中文 UI 上看不到英文 schema 詞，必須切換語言 frame 來理解，破壞 [review:ui] 自帶導覽性。違反「UI 元素 MUST 用使用者可見文字指代」hard rule 的另一形式
patterns.anchor: manual-review.data-readiness.md#ui-元素-must-用使用者可見文字指代
patterns.remediation: Replace mixed Chinese-English terms with full Chinese matching the actual UI label. Examples: 「未設 vending 位置」→「尚未配置販賣機格位」(grep code for actual i18n string / UI label); 「vending 庫存」→「販賣機庫存」or「販賣機格位數量」; 「slot 位置」→「販賣機格位」; 「tool body 規劃」→「刀具本體規劃」; 「kiosk 頁」→「平板操作頁」or 寫具體 URL。寫前先用 grep 確認該元素在 .vue / i18n 檔的實際中文 label。Backtick + 中文 gloss 形式（例「取料機位置 (`vending_location`)」）仍可接受，因 backtick 標明 codebase 詞屬 cross-reference 用途。

patterns.description: item 描述含 HTTP method + /api path 或 → status code（明顯為 backend round-trip）且 marker 為 [review:ui] 或缺 marker（fallback 也 derives 成 review:ui）— 違反 [review:ui] 收斂原則 hard rule，MUST 改 [verify:api] / [verify:e2e] / [verify:api+ui]。v1.4.0 起 regex 同時 cover 「[review:ui] explicit + API」與「無 marker + API」兩種變體（後者透過 Default Kind Derivation silent fallback 成 review:ui，behavior 等價但更隱密，必須一併擋）
patterns.remediation: HTTP method + path 或 → status code 是定義上的 agent-verifiable evidence（curl / ofetch / Playwright 可重現）。把這類 backend round-trip 標 [review:ui]（或不標 marker 讓 Default Kind Derivation silent fallback 成 review:ui）等於把該由 agent 自驗的工作丟回 user，違反 propose 階段對 user 時間的尊重。Replace `[review:ui]` / 缺 marker with: (a) `[verify:api]` for pure HTTP round-trip（主線跑 curl，寫 (verified-api: <ISO> <METHOD> <URL> <STATUS>) annotation）, (b) `[verify:e2e]` for persistence / multi-role journey requiring Playwright spec, (c) `[verify:api+ui]` for mutation + final-state visual confirmation. See manual-review.md「[review:ui] 收斂原則 hard rule」+「Kind 分類指引」反面範例。

patterns.description: scoped sub-item (#N.M) 缺 leading kind marker — 違反 manual-review.md「Item Kind Marker」規約。Default Kind Derivation Rule（fallback）只給 legacy in-flight item 過渡用，新寫或 ingest 修改的 sub-item MUST 顯式標 marker（[review:ui] / [discuss] / [verify:e2e/api/ui] 或 verify multi-marker）。Silent fallback 是「為何 [review:ui] 誤標反覆出現」的 root cause — fallback 永遠走最 strict 的 review:ui，把該由 agent 自驗的工作 silently 推給 user。
patterns.remediation: Inspect item content + decide kind per manual-review.md「Kind 分類指引」: (a) HTTP method + URL + status → [verify:api]; (b) reload / final-state visual / screenshot evidence → [verify:ui]; (c) persistence across reload / multi-role journey → [verify:e2e]; (d) mutation + visual confirmation → [verify:api+ui]; (e) SSH / psql / `\d <table>` / curl-cron / production observation / 商業判斷 → [discuss]; (f) 真的需要人（email inbox / webhook / 實體裝置 / 主觀美感 / 真機 / SMS）→ [review:ui]. Add the marker as the first token after the #N.M id with one space: `- [ ] #N.M [verify:api] ...`. For legitimate exceptions (e.g., legacy item awaiting ingest rewrite) add `@no-manual-review-check[<reason>]` trailing marker.

patterns.description: [verify:ui] item 描述含 identification verb（找到/定位/搜尋/locate/find/search）+ business-key 識別符（EMP-\d+ / contract-[a-z\-]+\d+ / 8-4-4-4-12 UUID）— agent 在 no-click scope（open URL + screenshot + DOM observation 只准被動觀察）通常無法 unambiguously bridge `sample-key → UI row` 對應，因為頁面常顯示 display name（許志明）而非 business key（EMP-012）、或顯示 truncated UUID（15f4562e...）而非 full business key（contract-intern-001）、或關鍵 column 根本沒 render。Agent 在這 scope mismatch 下會 fab `(verified-ui:)` annotation（per perno 2026-05-24 incident：9 annotation 全 fab，user 強制 strip + promote rule）。修正路徑：(a) grep `.vue` template 確認 target page 真的顯示該 business key inline（例 employee_no 是 column），保留 [verify:ui]；(b) 改 [review:ui] 由 user 親自 click / search / 用 domain 知識 identify row。
patterns.remediation: Decision criterion: if a screenshot of the loaded target URL contains the business key literal as visible text (e.g., employee_no column shows `EMP-012`, contract id column shows `contract-intern-001`, petition id column shows full UUID), agent CAN truthfully verify → keep [verify:ui]. Otherwise (UI shows display name only / truncated UUID / no relevant column), agent CANNOT bridge sample-key → row without clicking → MUST change to [review:ui]. Two practical fixes: (1) **Verify display path**: `grep -n 'employee_no\|contract_id\|petition.id' <target-page>.vue` to confirm the key is in a rendered column; if YES, rewrite description to point at that column name to disambiguate; if NO, switch to (2). (2) **Reclassify to [review:ui]**: replace `[verify:ui]` with `[review:ui]`; user親自 visually identify row in browser using domain knowledge (display name + status + position). For legitimate edge case where the key IS displayed but in a tab / column not visible at page-load, add `@no-manual-review-check[business-key-displayed-in-<context>]` trailing marker explaining where the key surfaces.

rules: Trailing token on a ## 人工檢查 checkbox line
<reason> MUST be non-empty (empty brackets or bare marker without brackets are invalid and ignored)
Canonical ordering with other trailing markers: @followup[TD-NNN] @no-manual-review-check[<reason>] @no-screenshot
Hook and review-gui both skip pattern evaluation for marked items but emit info-level log naming the reason
